gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Game runs, but input on controller was inconsistent. At times would be unresponsive, at others would act as if I'd held down a button for a second or two with only a single press.
title: Muffin Knight

notes: Didn't play it with a controller, but they keyboard controls work great and I didn't experience any stuttering or crashes.
